tasks.title: Scan source package
tasks.goal: Scan package folders and produce package_scan.json
tasks.verification_command: test -f generated/package_scan.json
tasks.completion_gate: package_scan.json exists
tasks.rollback_plan: Use history/pre_execution_framework_manifest.json and remove only files added by this task unless a task-specific rollback is listed.
tasks.notes: Preserves source manifest.

tasks.title: Generate execution gap report
tasks.goal: Identify missing framework and verification pieces
tasks.verification_command: test -f generated/gap_report.json && test -f docs/GAP_ANALYSIS.md
tasks.completion_gate: gap report and markdown exist
tasks.rollback_plan: Use history/pre_execution_framework_manifest.json and remove only files added by this task unless a task-specific rollback is listed.
tasks.notes: Documents gaps before fixes.

tasks.title: Apply execution framework files
tasks.goal: Add scripts, schemas, templates, generated folders, proof ledger, and examples
tasks.verification_command: test -d scripts && test -d schemas && test -d templates
tasks.completion_gate: required framework directories exist
tasks.rollback_plan: Use history/pre_execution_framework_manifest.json and remove only files added by this task unless a task-specific rollback is listed.
tasks.notes: Upgrade-only additive framework.

tasks.title: Generate task graph
tasks.goal: Create task_graph.csv, normalized JSON, and index JSON
tasks.verification_command: test -f generated/task_graph.csv && test -f generated/task_graph.normalized.json && test -f generated/task_graph.index.json
tasks.completion_gate: task graph files exist
tasks.rollback_plan: Use history/pre_execution_framework_manifest.json and remove only files added by this task unless a task-specific rollback is listed.
tasks.notes: Includes all artifact and implementation tasks.

tasks.title: Validate task graph
tasks.goal: Run required graph validator command
tasks.verification_command: test -f generated/task_graph.validation_report.json
tasks.completion_gate: validation_report.status == passed
tasks.rollback_plan: Use history/pre_execution_framework_manifest.json and remove only files added by this task unless a task-specific rollback is listed.
tasks.notes: Required missing-execution command.

tasks.title: Generate JSON execution packets
tasks.goal: Run required packetizer command
tasks.verification_command: test -f generated/execution_manifest.json && test -d generated/execution_packets
tasks.completion_gate: manifest and packets exist
tasks.rollback_plan: Use history/pre_execution_framework_manifest.json and remove only files added by this task unless a task-specific rollback is listed.
tasks.notes: Required missing-execution command.

tasks.title: Run /goal loop
tasks.goal: Compute runnable path and status report
tasks.verification_command: test -f state/goal_loop_state.json && test -f generated/status_report.json
tasks.completion_gate: goal loop writes state and status
tasks.rollback_plan: Use history/pre_execution_framework_manifest.json and remove only files added by this task unless a task-specific rollback is listed.
tasks.notes: Required missing-execution command.

tasks.title: Final history and completeness verification
tasks.goal: Run required final verification command
tasks.verification_command: test -f generated/final_verification_report.json && test -f docs/FINAL_VERIFICATION.md
tasks.completion_gate: final_verification status is pass or pass_with_external_blocker
tasks.rollback_plan: Use history/pre_execution_framework_manifest.json and remove only files added by this task unless a task-specific rollback is listed.
tasks.notes: Required missing-execution command.
